violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. The salad bar had multiple items that were temping above 50 degrees at the time of inspection. Cooling unit was not functioning properly at the time of inspection.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Tin foil wrapped shelving on the cook line is not a smooth cleanable surface. Insides of the reach in cooler doors by the cook line were missing the panels and are now bare foam.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine. Ran the dish machine multiple times and reached a high of 145 degrees.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors throughout the facility need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Above the dish machine is a hole where they installed its ventilation, hole has not been repaired and has exposed drywall.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface Bottom of RICoolers was not cleaned as frequently as required.--Nonfood contact surface Fan in Prep area was not cleaned as frequently as required.
